task: Go to https://app.samcart.com/marketplace/pauldavids/analytics/products. Set date range from Feb 1, 2026 to Feb 28, 2026. To change the date, type it in the field rather than trying to select the specific dates on the date selector calendar as sam cart is quite fiddly (E.g. for the date, it is formatted like this: 'Feb 10, 2026' so don't use this formatting: '2026-02-10'). There are two date selectors so choose the second one as that one changes the table data. Once you have typed it in, you then need to click off the date selector on the page for it to reload the table data with the new data. Return the orders for each product. The orders number is the number on the orders column. Ensure you select only this number and do so correctly. For context, it is the column inbetween 'Views' and 'Conversions'. It is not the 'Paypal Orders' or 'Credit card orders' value. Make sure you double check product Payment Plan Order figures. They should not be 0, so if you found they are, ensure you copied the right number. Especially for electric elevation payment plan. Click through the paginator at bottom of table to make sure you get all data from the table.
final_result:
Here are the Orders for each product for the date range February 1-28, 2026:

**Page 1 Products:**
1. Learn Practice Play: 200 orders
2. Next Level Playing: 145 orders
3. Electric Elevation: 36 orders
4. Acoustic Adventure: 180 orders
5. Loop School: 24 orders
6. Coaching Club (Monthly): 0 orders
7. Coaching Club (Early Annual): 0 orders
8. Learn Practice Play (Order Bump): 0 orders
9. Next Level Playing (Order Bump): 74 orders
10. Acoustic Adventure (Order Bump): 62 orders

**Page 2 Products:**
11. Next Level Playing (Payment Plan): 14 orders
12. Electric Elevation (Order Bump): 46 orders
13. Electric Elevation (Payment Plan): 4 orders (verified via Product Details page - table cell displayed empty but actual orders confirmed as 4)
14. Learn Practice Play (Payment Plan): 29 orders
15. Acoustic Adventure (Payment Plan): 20 orders
16. Loop School (Order Bump): 31 orders
17. Coaching Club (Monthly - 1st Month Free): 92 orders
18. Coaching Club (Annual): 0 orders
19. Coaching Club (Monthly - 3 Months Free): 12 orders

**Note:** Electric Elevation (Payment Plan) showed an empty cell in the Orders column but was verified to have 4 orders by clicking into the Product Details page where individual orders were visible (orders dated Feb 15, 19, 22, and 24, 2026).
